problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
hypothesis: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Hydrogel. Hydrogel swelling/shrinking response directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
